step_rationale: Platelet adhesion molecule upregulated in clopidogrel-nonresponders; enhanced thrombotic activation.
mechanism: CD226 upregulation enhances platelet-mediated thrombosis in clopidogrel-resistant ACS and Type 1 MI.

references.title: Inflammatory and antioxidant pattern unbalance in "clopidogrel-resistant" patients during acute coronary syndrome.
